name: getting-past-no-negotiating-in-difficult-situations
description: William Ury's 'Getting Past No: Negotiating in Difficult Situations' — the classic guide to dealing with difficult people and tough negotiations. A five-step breakthrough strategy: Go to the Balcony, Step to Their Side, Reframe, Build Them a Golden Bridge, and Use Power to Educate. The essential companion to Getting to Yes for when the other side says no.
